## **SECTION 2: SERVICE TIER SELECTION**

**Select ONE:**

☐ **Predictable Tier** (Pay-Per-Use)
  - Fee Structure:
    - TrueVow INTAKE: $29.00 per Qualified Booking
    - TrueVow SETTLE: $49.00 per Report
    - TrueVow DRAFT: 19% of Customer's document list price
    - TrueVow VERIFY: $15.00 per Blockchain Certificate
  - Included: Free website chatbot, Verify™ service
  - Optional Add-On: Priority Onboarding ($_______ one-time fee)

☐ **Growth Tier** (Unlimited Subscription)
  - Monthly Subscription Fee: $_______ per month
  - Included: Unlimited INTAKE/DRAFT/SETTLE/CONNECT access
  - Included: Custom intake scripts, dedicated compliance onboarding, bar audit defense support, Priority Onboarding
  - Subject to Fair Use Policy: 5,000 telephony minutes per seat per month

## **SECTION 4: DATA SECURITY & COMPLIANCE**

### **4.1 Zero-Knowledge Architecture & Retention**

**Default Setting:** Zero-retention (no call audio/transcripts stored)

☐ **Enable Optional 7-Day Retention Toggle** (Customer assumes all risk)
  - ⚠️ **WARNING:** Enabling this feature makes Customer solely responsible for:
    - Compliance with state recording-consent laws (CA, FL, etc.)
    - TCPA compliance
    - CCPA/GDPR compliance (if applicable)
    - HIPAA compliance (if applicable)
    - All data breach liabilities

**Recording Consent Acknowledgment (if enabled above):**

☐ Customer acknowledges and indemnifies TrueVow for any violation of state recording-consent laws

|-------------|--------|

## **SECTION 5: FOUNDING MEMBER PROGRAM** (if applicable)

☐ **Customer is a Founding Member**

**Founding Member Criteria Met:**

☐ In good standing (no suspension or breach)  
☐ Has exhausted the 11 free bookings  
☐ Has paid for ≥ 1 booking at standard rate  
☐ Manually approved by TrueVow (Date: _________)

**Founding Member Benefits:**

| Benefit | Details |
|---------|---------|
| **Locked Rate:** | $25.00 per Qualified Booking (vs. $29.00 standard) |
| **Lock Period:** | Until July 4, 2026 (minimum) |
| **Free Monthly Bookings:** | 3 Qualified Bookings per month |
| **Activity Gate:** | Must satisfy ONE monthly: |
| | ☐ ≥ 1 paid booking, OR |
| | ☐ ≥ 1 settlement data submission, OR |
| | ☐ ≥ 3 qualified attorney referrals/year |

**Activity Gate Failure Consequence:**

⚠️ 3 consecutive months failure = **permanent loss** of free bookings + rate reverts to $29 after 12-month grace period. Status cannot be reinstated.

## **SECTION 9: ACKNOWLEDGMENTS & REPRESENTATIONS**

By signing below, Customer acknowledges, represents, and warrants:

☐ Customer is a licensed attorney or law firm in good standing  
☐ Customer has authority to bind the law firm to this Agreement  
☐ Customer has read and agrees to the Master Services Agreement v3.0  
☐ Customer acknowledges TrueVow's Core Logic is FSM-based (no generative AI)  
☐ Customer acknowledges Ancillary ML Tools are for non-legal, operational purposes only  
☐ Customer assumes full professional responsibility for all outputs  
☐ Customer will comply with all state bar rules and ABA Model Rules  
☐ Customer is not located in or controlled by any entity in a sanctioned territory (OFAC)  
☐ Customer will not export, re-export, or use Services in violation of EAR or ITAR  
☐ Customer indemnifies TrueVow for malpractice, ethics violations, and bar rule violations  
☐ Customer agrees to Swiss law governing and ICC Zurich arbitration (or AAA for claims ≤$50K)
